raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tapehz faſki uhs teem
ſcho Wahrdu: Mannas Azzis
notezzehe ar Affarahm Deenâs
un Naktis/ un ue mittefeeg;
Jo ta Jumprawa / ta Meita
mannu Kauschu irr fatreehta ar
leelu Satreeſchannu / ar fohti
fahvejamu Mohzibu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rad es iſeemu Laukâ /
tad raugi/ tur irr Nokauti zaue
Schbinu/ nahfu es Pileſahtâ/
tad raugi/ tur irr Badda Sehr-
gas. Un tif labbi Praueefchi ka
Preesteri ſtraida apkahrt eekſch
Semmes/ un ne finna nenceka.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Effi tu tad Juhdn wiſſai
atmettis? Jebirrag tawa Dweh-
fefe Zianas apnikkuſi ? Rapehz
cfi tu muhs fittis/ ka preekſch
munâ Djeedinatchanas newa?
uâ Meeru tohp gaidihts / bet
newaid nekahds Labbums / un
ug. Dseedinaschanas Laiku / bet
rangti/tur irr Iſtruhzinaſchana.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "KUNGGS/ mehs atſih-
ſtam ſawu Besdeeſwibu / un
tschetrfabrtigahm Mohztbahm/
muhfo Tehwo Noseegumu / jo
mehs eſam prett tew grehkoſchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ne atmett muhs tawa
Wahrda deht/ un laid taws
Gohdibas Krehtſis ne tohp nee-
wahts/ peeminnt un ne iſnihzi-
na tawn Derribu ar mums.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Irrag ſarp to Pagannu
Elka-Deetweem/ kas leek Lectus
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "liht? Jeb warriq ta Debbes Lee-
tus doht? Neggi tu effi tas/ ak
KUNGGS! muhsu Deews? Ta-
pehz gribbam mehs us tewi gai-
diht/ jo tu datri wiſſas fchihâ
Leetas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta XV. Nodalla.
Deews atbild tam Praueetam / ka ne kahba
PreekſchLuhgſchana wairs ne palihds/ kant
arri Mohsus un Samuels tur stahwetu : 1.
Eepreezina arri to paſchu prett wiſſu ſawu
Ruhpeſchannu/ kas winnam eekſch ſawa Am,
mata uhsgahjuſi irraid/ 10/ 19.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "N tas KUNGGS tazzi-
ja uhs manni: Jepſchn
ir Mohsus un Samuels
mannâ Preekſcha stahwetu/ to-
mebr man ne buhtu labs Prahts
pee fcheem Laudim/ dsenn tohs
nohft no mannas Preekſchas/
un laid tee ahran eet.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kad tee uhs tewi fazzihs:
Kurp eeſim mehs? tad faſki uhs
teem: Ta fakka tas KUNGGS;
Ram ta Nahwe uſeet/ tam laid
ta uſeet/ un kam tas Sohbins
uſeet/ tam laid tas uſeet/ un
kam tas Bads uſeet/ tam laid
tas uſeet/ un kam tas Zeetums
uſeet/ tam laid tas uſeet.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo es peemeſſeſchn tohs a
fakka tas KUNGGS: Ar to Sob-
binn/ tohs nokaudams/ un a
Sunneem tohs raustidams/ ur
ar Putueem appakſch Debbes,
un ar Semmes Swehreem/ ko
tee tohp aprichti un maitati.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es nodohſchu tohs / k
tee fchaubiti taps wiſſas Sem
mes Walſtibas/ Manaſsus deht
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
